title: Agent Reliability — Grounded Diagnostics, Flood-Wait Fixes & Web Polish

highlights.title: Grounded Runtime Diagnostics Tool
highlights.description: Agent's diagnostics tool now reports real account availability from the Settings source of truth instead of stale snapshot data (#530, #529). Agents get accurate pool status for better decision-making during collection and publishing tasks.

highlights.title: Reaction Flood-Wait Bypass Fix
highlights.description: Stopped reaction operations from silently bypassing flood-wait guards and added retryable cancellation handling (#597). Prevents cascading FloodWaitErrors that could lock accounts for extended periods.

highlights.title: Username Resolve Rate Limiter
highlights.description: Per-account rate limiter for resolve_username prevents hitting Telegram limits when many channels are processed simultaneously (#551). Complements the existing global resolve backoff.

highlights.title: Global Resolve Backoff Hardening
highlights.description: Capped and cache-only global resolve backoff prevents indefinite resolution delays (#552). Respects Telegram's error signalling without over-backing-off.

highlights.title: CLI Auth Pool Warm-Up Fix
highlights.description: Account persistence now happens before pool warm-up in verify-code, so newly verified accounts are immediately available without restart (#449).

highlights.title: Pipeline Write-Lock Integrity
highlights.description: Pipeline source/target replace operations now stay inside the DB write-lock, preventing potential concurrent-write corruption (#633).

highlights.title: Web Premium/Telegram Search Proxy
highlights.description: Web-to-worker proxy for premium search and Telegram search operations ensures these features work correctly in split web/worker deployments (#643).

highlights.title: Web UI Polish
highlights.description: Responsive layout improvements for the tg agent interface — better mobile and small-screen experience.

highlights.title: Custom Test Notification Text
highlights.description: Web UI now allows custom text when sending test notifications, making it easier to verify notification setup (#563).
